subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-04-02
subcodes.first_line: Friends! The time is coming when I shall be no longer with you. I have done all that could be done
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عنقریب یومی اید که دیگر مرا نخواهید دید آنچه تکلیف من بود بجا آوردم
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @call to action, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
